I modernize legacy codebases, design scalable web systems, and ship production-ready platforms end to end across frontend, backend, and infrastructure. Strong in React and TypeScript, Node.js APIs, PostgreSQL, Terraform, CI/CD, and AWS and Azure patterns, with a track record delivering remotely across teams in multiple continents. I prioritize maintainability, performance, and predictable delivery. CORE SKILLS React · TypeScript · Vite · Next.js · Tailwind CSS v4 · Design Tokens · ShadCN · TanStack Query (React Query) · Zustand · Redux migrations · Node.js · Express · REST APIs · PostgreSQL · Prisma/Drizzle ORM · Redis · WebSockets · Docker · Terraform · GitHub Actions · AWS (ECS, S3, RDS, ECR, EC2, Route 53) · Azure (ADF/ADLS exposure) · Observability (Grafana/Prometheus/Loki) · Architecture (feature-based, modular, layered/Clean, event-driven) EXPERIENCE PRIVV — Senior Software Engineer (Full-time) Modernizing a legacy React frontend for a construction project management platform. Tech: React · NestJS · TypeScript · Vite · Tailwind v4 · TanStack Query · Zustand · Vitest · ESLint/Prettier · Husky· Biome • Upgraded core stack: React 17 to 19, TypeScript , CRA to Vite, SASS to Tailwind v4 with token-based design system to reduce build friction and enable faster iteration. • Re-architected into feature-based modules with reusable hooks/components to improve change isolation and parallel development. • Migrated state/data patterns: Redux to TanStack Query + Zustand using cache-first query key strategy and structured invalidation (optimistic updates where applicable). • Implemented token-driven UI with Tailwind v4 design tokens for consistent styling and scalable theming. • Raised quality bar: ESLint, Prettier, Vitest, Husky; enforced SRP and modular boundaries to reduce regressions. • Decomposed a legacy React monolith into smaller, maintainable modules, improving separation of concerns (723 to 2,197 files) and cutting average file size by 56%. DataGPT AI — Software Engineer (Part-time) Improved reliability and usability of a chat-driven AI analytics product. Tech: React · TypeScript · Data Visualization · Reliability Patterns · Workflow UI (node-based) · Analytics UX • Expanded in-chat analytics rendering to support advanced charts (e.g., heatmaps, treemaps, stacked bars) for exploratory analysis. • Implemented retry + recovery flow for long-running requests to reduce dropped responses and improve perceived reliability. • Delivered Agents V1 orchestration UI (node-based workflow builder: Data Source, Prompt, Condition, Recipient) as foundation for automation UX. Experience Digital — Senior Software Engineer to DevOps Engineer (Full-time) Fullstack-to-DevOps progression supporting web services, CI/CD, and reliability.
